Prof. Dr. Özgür Orhangazi’s New Book “The Structure of the Turkish Economy” is Out

Department of Economics faculty member Prof. Dr. Özgür Orhangazi’s new book “The Structure of the Turkish Economy” is out. The book deals with the main problems of the Turkish economy in its historical and global context and presents the problems, vulnerabilities and crisis dynamics of the economy in a way that even non-economists can understand. In the words of Prof. Dr. Korkut Boratav, Özgür Orhangazi’s book is “a very important source for anyone who wants to grasp the recent history of the Turkish economy, the dilemmas and problems of the neoliberal era.”
